items.name: Ultraviolet Blaster
items.description: Pew! Pew! Neon magenta laser beams are everywhere, but you don't care because you're the one shooting them! This weapon is good for shooting things from a distance. Hit 'Z' to activate the scope and use the mouse to zoom in and get a better view of the target.

items.name: Red Fidget Spinner
items.description: Red is where it's at! The fidget spinner will spin when you click on it and each time you click on it, the faster it will spin.

items.name: Fireball Spell
items.description: Turn your enemies into a crispy crater!

items.name: Bouquet of Pain Throwing Stars
items.description: The only thing more painful than spring allergies: flower shaped throwing stars.

items.name: Potato Cannon
items.description: Cloudy with a chance of raw potatoes? Hurl potatoes through the sky to stun your foes!

items.name: Elixir of Dreams
items.description: In a dream - you're stronger and faster.  This potion makes your dream a reality. Be careful when holding this potion.  When dropped, it has a very different effect.

items.name: Ninja Blink Potion
items.description: You blink - you're in a new location.  Yeah - Ninjas are fast!

items.name: Atomizer
items.description: Split yourself into pieces to evade your enemies!

items.name: Mostly Ghostly Potion
items.description: How can you be mostly ghostly? Click to fly around as a ghost; your character appears transparent and can fly!

items.name: Judge Underwood's Gavel
items.description: No you're out of order!  This whole trial's out of order!

items.name: Bluesteel Claw
items.description: Embrace your inner beast!

items.name: Spring Sunshine
items.description: You're just all sunshine and flowers!  Literally!  Bring the sun and have flowers grow everywhere you go.

items.name: Knight's Sword
items.description: Keep down the peasant uprisings with this gleaming longsword.

items.name: Banjo
items.description:
I want to be a rock star, and travel really far, and buy / me a big expensive car. /
And make lots of money and find me a honey. /
And live in nice big house where it's sunny. /
With a pool and I'll be cool. /
I'll always have a gig cause I'll be big. /
I'll have parties and friends and places to go, /
The only problem is I play the banjo. - Ryan Shupe

items.name: Spy All Terrain Vehicle
items.description: Every spy needs a car that’s a boat, and a boat that’s a car.

items.name: Skele-tar
items.description:
Columbus he set sail to find out if the world was round /
He kept on sailing west until he ran aground /
He thought he'd found the Indies, but he found the U.S.A. /
I know some navigators who can still do that today

items.name: Steampunk Hoverboard
items.description: At long last, you can harness the mighty power of steam to give you the power of flight. Well more like the power to float close to the ground, but at high speeds. Ok well, high-ish speeds. It's definitely faster than walking.

items.name: Gear suppressor 777
items.description: This will make your enemies speechless. 10 seconds of no tool usage should be plenty of time for you to finish them off.

items.name: Blue Speedster
items.description: Drive this road-ready, raceable speedster with  'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys.

items.name: War Rocks
items.description: Has anyone ever read The Lottery by Shirley Jackson? It's hugely overrated.
